headline_seed: El Niño is coming faster than expected and chances are rising that it will be historically strong - CNN
draft_text:
NOAA's Climate Prediction Center forecasts El Nino arriving within a month — sooner than expected. CNN reports roughly a 2-in-3 chance it reaches strong or very strong intensity by winter 2026-2027. BBC News puts Super El Nino odds above 1-in-3.

And that's the mews.
